chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 137 of 2019. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 25.02.2019. 1. For orders on M.A. No. 237/2019. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No. 238/2019. 4. For hearing of main case. Mr. Mazhar Ali Mangan, Advocate for petitioners. ~~~~~~~ 1. Urgency application granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption allowed subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this petition, the petitioner has alleged harassment at the hands of official respondents on instance of private respondents and also seeks legal protection. On query, learned counsel for petitioners admits that he has not approached the S.S.P Complaint Cell of the concerned district. Accordingly, office is directed to send copy of instant petition and its annexures to S.S.P Complaint Cell, Larkana, who shall enquire into the matter within two weeks and redress grievance of the petitioners. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Ansari/*
